description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a rectangular display framed by a moderately thick, black bezel. The front surface is dominated by the screen, which is bordered by a matte black frame with slightly rounded corners. The monitor is supported by a wide, flat, rectangular stand that appears to be made of sturdy plastic with a metallic finish, providing stability. The rear of the monitor is solid black with visible venting slats and a central mounting point where the stand attaches. No buttons or ports are visible on the front, sides, or rear, suggesting a minimalist design. The overall appearance is modern and functional, suitable for office or public urban environments.
description: A modern flat-panel computer monitor with a black bezel and a wide, sturdy rectangular stand. The design is sleek and minimal, with no visible buttons or ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, flat display area framed by a black bezel and supported by a wide, rectangular stand.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the monitor's slim profile and the depth of the stand's base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black back panel, venting slats, and the attachment point for the stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the thinness of the monitor and the full length of the stand's base.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is moderately thick, matte black, with slightly rounded corners and a smooth, untextured finish. It frames the display area evenly on all sides with no decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, flat, rectangular pedestal with a metallic gray finish and a solid, stable base. It attaches centrally to the rear of the monitor and appears rigid, with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: A single round button is visible on the lower part of the stand, centered below the screen, likely serving as a power button.
